endpoints.label: Post Message Chat

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your RocketChat server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: The channel name with the prefix in front of it

fields.label: Text
fields.description: The text of the message to send, is optional because of attachments

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: alias, avatar, emoji)

fields.label: Attachments
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: color, text, ts, thumbUrl, messageLink, collapsed, authorName, authorLink, authorIcon, title, titleLink, titleLinkDownload, imageUrl, audioUrl, videoUrl, fields)

endpoints.description: Post a message to a channel or a direct message
